subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Single One, the All-Knowing, the Manifestation of His Cause and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو الفرد الخبیر انه مظهر امره و
subcodes.subjects: @station of the Manifestation of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation
